name: Vinyasa flow
desc: A flowing, breath-led class that builds gentle heat. Options for every body.

name: Slow flow
desc: Half the pace, twice the detail. Time to feel each shape land.

name: Yin & restore
desc: Long, supported holds and deep stillness. The softest hour of the week.

name: Strong flow
desc: A spirited, sweatier practice for when the body wants to work.

name: Morning mobility
desc: Wake the joints, free the spine, and start the day a little looser.

name: Beginners course
desc: Four weeks, right from the very beginning. No experience needed.
